content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
E02:00MOMx8 Sets:
1 Clean&Jerk

Metcon:
18:00 Min AMRAP:
15 KB Swings #24/16kg
20 Push Ups
25 Air Squats

CrossFit Endurance
40:00 Min AMRAP:
24/18 Cals Row
16 1DB Alternating Hang Clean&Jerk #1x15/10kg
14 Burpees Over The DB
12 Knees To Elbows
**Every 04:00 Min, Including 00:00, Perform 12 WallBall Shots #10/6kg
